rationale: Both papers focus on cause-related marketing core mechanisms: the cited study estimates how donation amount affects WTP with moderators, and the citing study analyzes real-market CMP sales lift including donation depth and contextual moderators. The citing note explicitly positions its contribution as extending prior CMP evidence from lab/simplified settings to FMCG field data, making this cited JMR paper a plausible theory/mechanism antecedent rather than an incidental mention (with an exact DOI match).
